zh.lifeSummary: 當Philippa Maureward於1391年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾可爾奧爾頓時，她的父親Sir Thomas Maureward31歲，母親Elizabeth Oddingseles21歲。她於1413年與Thomas de Beaumont在英國萊希斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1480年在英國享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philippa Maureward于1391年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾可爾奧爾頓时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Maureward31岁，母亲Elizabeth Oddingseles21岁。她于1413年与Thomas de Beaumont在英国萊希斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1480年在英国享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Philippa
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Philip . In England during the Middle Ages the vernacular name Philip was borne by women as well as men, but female bearers were distinguished in Latin records by this form. It was not, however, used as a regular given name until the 19th century.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Philippa Maureward was born in 1391, in Coleorton, Leicestershire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Maureward, was 31 and her mother, Elizabeth Oddingseles, was 21. She married Thomas de Beaumont in 1413, in Leicestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1480, in England, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philippa Maureward est née en 1391, à Coleorton, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Maureward, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Oddingseles, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas de Beaumont en 1413, à Leicestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1480, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philippa Maureward 1391 in Coleorton, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Maureward 31 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Oddingseles 21. Sie hat 1413 in Leicestershire, England Thomas de Beaumont geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1480 im Alter von 89 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa Maureward è nata il nel 1391 nel Coleorton, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Maureward, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Oddingseles, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Thomas de Beaumont nel 1413, nel Leicestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1480, nel England, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Philippa Maurewardが1391年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアコーレオルトンで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Maurewardは31歳，母Elizabeth Oddingselesは21歳であった。1413年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアでThomas de Beaumontと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1480年にイギリスで89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philippa Maureward(이)가 1391년 영국 레이스스터실르 콜리르턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Maureward(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Oddingseles(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1413년 영국 레이스스터실르에서 Thomas de Beaumont(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1480년 영국에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philippa Maureward nasceu em 1391, em Coleorton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Maureward, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Oddingseles, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas de Beaumont em 1413, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1480, em Inglaterra, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philippa Maureward родилась в 1391 г. в местности колеортон, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Maureward было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Oddingseles, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas de Beaumont в 1413 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1480 г. в местности Англия в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philippa Maureward nació en 1391, en Coleorton, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Maureward, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Oddingseles, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Thomas de Beaumont en 1413, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1480, en Inglaterra, a la edad de 89 años.
